patches.replace: (a) what derivation from dome geometry produces the claimed 3:1 ratio — the dome's WIN-063 trailing paragraph does specify 3:1 vs the globe's ~1.0x, but adopts that ratio from CHAOS-7 observation rather than deriving it from dome geometry (no formula on the dome site connects disc_radius=20,015 km or firmament_height=9,086 km to specifically 3:1 rather than 2:1 or 5:1)
patches.rationale: Strawman fix: dome DOES specify 3:1. Reframe (a) to acknowledge specification and attack lack of derivation.

patches.find: The dome provides no numerical value, no derivation, and no mechanism.
patches.replace: The dome's WIN-063 specifies a 3:1 asymmetry ratio but adopts that value from CHAOS-7 observation rather than deriving it from dome geometry (no formula connects disc_radius=20,015 km or firmament_height=9,086 km to specifically 3:1). The dome offers only a qualitative mechanism (toroidal return-path through the SAA shoulder) with no quantitative derivation.
patches.rationale: TLDR factual error: dome DOES specify 3:1 and does have a qualitative mechanism.

patches.find: The dome specifies no numerical value and has no mechanism.
patches.replace: The dome specifies a 3:1 ratio but adopts it from CHAOS-7 observation rather than deriving it from dome geometry — without a prior derivation, any observed asymmetry ratio would retrospectively match.
patches.rationale: TLDR factual error fix matching tldr_evidence patch.

patches.find: no monitor.py entry exists for this value at all — the dome author has not included it in the monitoring suite
patches.replace: no asymmetry-ratio domain appears in any monitor.py snapshot in our raw-text/ corpus — the dome author has not included this value in the monitoring suite as of our last full capture
patches.rationale: Hedge unverifiable absence claim about monitor.py content.

patches.find: (c) using what definition of "hemispheric" on a flat disc (where the geometric 'northern hemisphere' is a central disc and the 'southern hemisphere' is the surrounding annulus — structurally asymmetric by construction)
patches.replace: (c) using what definition of "hemispheric" on a flat disc — the dome's flat-disc geometry makes the central-vs-annular regions geometrically non-comparable to a globe's northern-vs-southern hemispheres (the geometric 'northern hemisphere' is a central disc, the 'southern hemisphere' the surrounding annulus — structurally asymmetric by construction), so any ratio observed on either model means a different thing; the dome does not address this incommensurability or explain why its inherent geometric asymmetry should produce specifically 3:1 rather than any other ratio
patches.rationale: Strengthen (c): make explicit incommensurability argument instead of implying dome has no definition.

patches.find: “the African SAA cell decays faster than the American cell”
patches.replace: “the African SAA cell decays faster than the Atlantic cell”
patches.rationale: Cross-WIN quotation fix: WIN-005 uses "Atlantic cell" not "American cell".
